summary: Comprehensive motor cover for private passenger vehicles. Repairs at any licensed repairer with optional 'choice-of-repairer' add-on; otherwise Zava preferred-repairer network. Hire-car after a not-at-fault accident included; broader hire-car add-on extends to at-fault events for up to 21 days.
coverage: Insured events: collision & impact; theft and attempted theft; malicious damage; fire; storm, hail & flood; windscreen and window glass; legal liability for damage to other people's property up to $20m. Choice between agreed-value and market-value sum insured. New-for-old replacement on vehicles under 3 years and under 40,000km when written off. No-claim-bonus protection add-on preserves the customer's NCB after one at-fault claim per period.
exclusions: Driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs; driving without a valid licence; use as a rideshare or commercial vehicle unless declared; intentional or reckless damage; mechanical or electrical breakdown unrelated to an insured event; tyre damage from wear and tear; loss while unattended with keys in the ignition.
evidenceRequired: Police report number for theft, malicious damage or any third-party injury
Repairer quote (or two quotes if customer-selected non-panel repairer)
